summary: Hardened Tools/bump-version.sh so missing CHANGELOG.md or a missing ## [Unreleased] section fails before MARKETING_VERSION or CURRENT_PROJECT_VERSION can be mutated. Added isolated temp-repo tests proving both failure modes leave project metadata unchanged and preserved valid changelog promotion behavior.
missing_proof_levels: No app build or runtime validation was required; this slice changes release tooling, tests, and release workflow docs only.

contract_status_changes.before: Tools/bump-version.sh warned and skipped changelog promotion when CHANGELOG.md was missing, after already mutating project version metadata.
contract_status_changes.after: Tools/bump-version.sh exits before metadata mutation unless CHANGELOG.md exists and contains ## [Unreleased].

contract_status_changes.contract: Bump-version non-mutation on invalid release-note state
contract_status_changes.before: There was no focused regression coverage proving missing changelog state leaves MARKETING_VERSION and CURRENT_PROJECT_VERSION unchanged.
contract_status_changes.after: Temp-repo tests prove missing CHANGELOG.md and missing ## [Unreleased] both fail without changing project metadata.

residual_risks: No known residual risk for this release tooling gate.
recommended_next_reason: No adjacent queued release slices remain after this gate; run the supervisor or clean-stop to confirm global queue state.
